name: Terrainbound
mission: Long-trail endurance and turnaround ethics — useful field skills, retired as a standalone product.
portfolioNote: Terrainbound is retired as a standalone product. Route journaling moves to Fieldry. Trail conditions and weather windows stay on the regional dashboard. Conservation and turnaround ethics remain in Learn content.
learnToday: Why slow is a skill — pacing, weather windows, and turnaround time
Turning back as success — honored in Fieldry route notes
Trail ethics on popular paths — leave plan and group communication
Why Waypoint is not building an AllTrails-style route utility
comingSoon: Trail condition notes on the regional dashboard News slice
Conservation lessons in shared Learn content
No race timing, leaderboards, or wearable sync

preview.title: The long trail shelter
preview.description: The miles change how you see — but endurance journaling belongs in Fieldry and stewardship belongs on the dashboard. This page documents retirement of the standalone product concept.
